package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for shouldbindbodywith_when_single_bind_is_enough: Gin handlers that use ShouldBindBodyWith(...) even though only one body bind is observed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule337NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule337NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule337NegativeRecord) (Rule337NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario337Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule337NegativeService, input Rule337NegativeRecord) (Rule337NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule337NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
